scripts.dev-install: npm run build -w packages/core && npm link -w packages/core && npm run compile -w packages/vscode && node scripts/link-vscode-ext.js
scripts.dev-build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run compile -w packages/vscode
scripts.dev-reset: npm unlink -g bell-lang && npm install -g bell-lang && node scripts/unlink-vscode-ext.js
